metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.description: Detects ransomware indicators on retail endpoints including mass file encryption and known ransomware families. Queries RetailShield_Logs_CL for Ransomware_Indicator events with high FilesModified_d or SuspicionScore_d, sourced from the RetailShield log generator. Aligned with MITRE T1486 — Data Encrypted for Impact.
